title: 菊花賞の後に・喝采！三冠祭り

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black has won the Triple Crown. She's
accomplished a grand feat not even Tokai Teio
was able to achieve and has reached the hearts of
countless fans.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tokai Teio congratulates her on her win.
Meanwhile, Sakura Bakushin O realizes her job as
mentor is complete and takes leave of her role.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Then, as if resonating with and echoing Kitasan
Black's incredible performance, Satono Diamond
claims victory in her own debut race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black's next goal is the Arima Kinen. In
order to realize her dream of reuniting with
Satono Diamond on that illustrious stage, she
charges forth on her own.
